# anthropic_cost_report (Data Source)

Fetches the cost report from the Anthropic Admin API. Returns monetary cost amounts per time bucket, optionally grouped by workspace_id and/or description. Currently only `1d` bucket width is supported by the API.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Daily cost per workspace for the last 30 days.
data "anthropic_cost_report" "last_month" {
  starting_at  = formatdate("YYYY-MM-DD'T'00:00:00'Z'", timeadd(timestamp(), "-720h"))
  bucket_width = "1d"
  group_by     = ["workspace_id"]
}

output "cost_per_workspace" {
  value = {
    for b in data.anthropic_cost_report.last_month.buckets :
    b.starting_at => {
      for r in b.results : coalesce(r.workspace_id, "default") => r.amount
    }
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `starting_at` (String)

### Optional

- `bucket_width` (String) Only `1d` is currently supported by the API.
- `ending_at` (String)
- `group_by` (List of String) Subset of: workspace_id, description.
- `limit` (Number)
- `page` (String)
- `workspace_ids` (List of String)

### Read-Only

- `buckets` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--buckets))
- `has_more` (Boolean)
- `next_page` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--buckets"></a>
### Nested Schema for `buckets`

Read-Only:

- `ending_at` (String)
- `results` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--buckets--results))
- `starting_at` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--buckets--results"></a>
### Nested Schema for `buckets.results`

Read-Only:

- `amount` (String) Decimal cost amount as a string (e.g. "123.45").
- `context_window` (String)
- `cost_type` (String)
- `currency` (String)
- `description` (String)
- `inference_geo` (String)
- `model` (String)
- `service_tier` (String)
- `token_type` (String)
- `workspace_id` (String)
